sentences.sentence: Across cultures, wisdom has been considered one of the most revered human qualities.
sentences.translation: 在不同文化中，智慧一直被视为人类最受推崇的品质之一。

structure.text: one of the most revered human qualities

difficult_points: has been considered 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调这一看法长期延续至今。
one of 后接复数名词，表示“最受推崇的人类品质之一”。

sentences.sentence: Although the truly wise may seem few and far between, empirical research examining wisdom suggests that it isn't an exceptional trait possessed by a small handful of bearded philosophers after all – in fact, the latest studies suggest that most of us have the ability to make wise decisions, given the right context.
sentences.translation: 虽然真正有智慧的人似乎凤毛麟角，但研究智慧的实证研究表明，智慧终究并非少数蓄须哲学家才拥有的非凡特质；事实上，最新研究显示，只要情境合适，我们大多数人都有能力作出明智的决定。

structure.text: Although the truly wise may seem few and far between
may seem few and far between
that it isn't an exceptional trait possessed by a small handful of bearded philosophers after all
possessed by a small handful of bearded philosophers
in fact, the latest studies suggest
that most of us have the ability to make wise decisions

difficult_points: the truly wise 是“the + 形容词”结构，泛指真正有智慧的人。
examining wisdom 和 possessed by... 分别后置修饰 research 与 trait。
两个 suggest 后都接 that 引导的宾语从句，破折号后进一步补充研究结论。
given the right context 是省略条件从句，意为“如果有合适的情境”。

sentences.sentence: 'It appears that experiential, situational, and cultural factors are even more powerful in shaping wisdom than previously imagined,' says Associate Professor Igor Grossmann of the University of Waterloo in Ontario, Canada.
sentences.translation: 加拿大安大略省滑铁卢大学副教授伊戈尔·格罗斯曼说：“经验、情境和文化因素对智慧的塑造作用，似乎比人们先前想象的还要强大。”

structure.text: that experiential, situational, and cultural factors are even more powerful in shaping wisdom than previously imagined
says Associate Professor Igor Grossmann of the University of Waterloo in Ontario, Canada

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正表达内容的是 that 引导的主语从句。
than previously imagined 省略了 they were，表示“比先前想象的更……”。
引语后的 says 位于主语之前，是直接引语后的倒装式引述结构。

sentences.sentence: 'Recent empirical findings from cognitive, developmental, social, and personality psychology cumulatively suggest that people's ability to reason wisely varies dramatically across experiential and situational contexts.
sentences.translation: 认知心理学、发展心理学、社会心理学和人格心理学近期的实证发现综合表明，人们进行明智推理的能力会随经验和情境的不同而发生显著变化。

structure.text: Recent empirical findings from cognitive, developmental, social, and personality psychology
that people's ability to reason wisely varies dramatically across experiential and situational contexts

difficult_points: findings 是主语中心词，from 后的一长串心理学分支限定这些研究发现的来源。
that 引导 suggest 的宾语从句，从句谓语是 varies。
ability 后的不定式 to reason wisely 说明具体是哪一种能力。

sentences.sentence: Understanding the role of such contextual factors offers unique insights into understanding wisdom in daily life, as well as how it can be enhanced and taught.'
sentences.translation: 理解这些情境因素的作用，能让我们对日常生活中的智慧以及如何提升和传授智慧获得独到见解。”

structure.text: Understanding the role of such contextual factors
into understanding wisdom in daily life
as well as how it can be enhanced and taught
how it can be enhanced and taught

difficult_points: 句首 Understanding... 是动名词短语，整体充当主语。
insights into 中的 into 是介词，后接动名词 understanding。
how 引导的从句与 understanding wisdom... 并列，it 指代 wisdom。

sentences.sentence: It seems that it's not so much that some people simply possess wisdom and others lack it, but that our ability to reason wisely depends on a variety of external factors.
sentences.translation: 看来，与其说有些人天生拥有智慧而另一些人缺乏智慧，不如说我们明智推理的能力取决于多种外部因素。

structure.text: that it's not so much that some people simply possess wisdom and others lack it, but that our ability to reason wisely depends on a variety of external factors
not so much that some people simply possess wisdom and others lack it
some people simply possess wisdom and others lack it
but that our ability to reason wisely depends on a variety of external factors

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，seems 后的 that 从句承载真正内容。
not so much A but B 表示“与其说是 A，不如说是 B”。
前半部分的 it 指代 wisdom，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: 'It is impossible to characterize thought processes attributed to wisdom without considering the role of contextual factors,' explains Grossmann.
sentences.translation: 格罗斯曼解释说：“如果不考虑情境因素的作用，就不可能描述被认为与智慧相关的思维过程。”

structure.text: to characterize thought processes attributed to wisdom
without considering the role of contextual factors

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的主语是后面的不定式 to characterize...。
attributed to wisdom 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 thought processes。
without considering... 表示否定条件，可理解为“如果不考虑……”。

sentences.sentence: 'In other words, wisdom is not solely an “inner quality” but rather unfolds as a function of situations people happen to be in.
sentences.translation: 换言之，智慧并不只是一种“内在品质”，而是会随着人们碰巧身处的情境而展现出来。

structure.text: but rather unfolds as a function of situations

difficult_points: not solely... but rather... 表示“不仅仅是……，而是……”。
people happen to be in 是省略关系词 that 的定语从句，修饰 situations。
从句末的 in 与被省略的关系词构成 be in situations 的搭配。

sentences.sentence: Some situations are more likely to promote wisdom than others.'
sentences.translation: 有些情境比其他情境更有可能促进智慧。
difficult_points: be likely to 表示“可能做某事”，more likely 构成比较级。
others 在比较结构中代替 other situations，以避免重复。

sentences.sentence: Coming up with a definition of wisdom is challenging, but Grossmann and his colleagues have identified four key characteristics as part of a framework of wise reasoning.
sentences.translation: 给智慧下定义并不容易，但格罗斯曼及其同事已经确定了明智推理框架中的四个关键特征。

structure.text: Coming up with a definition of wisdom
but Grossmann and his colleagues have identified four key characteristics
as part of a framework of wise reasoning

difficult_points: Coming up with... 是动名词短语，整体充当句子主语。
but 连接两个转折关系的并列分句。
as part of... 说明这四个特征在明智推理框架中的归属。

sentences.sentence: One is intellectual humility or recognition of the limits of our own knowledge, and another is appreciation of perspectives wider than the issue at hand.
sentences.translation: 其中一个特征是智识谦逊，即认识到自身知识的局限；另一个则是重视比眼前问题更广阔的视角。

structure.text: is intellectual humility or recognition of the limits of our own knowledge
and another is appreciation of perspectives wider than the issue at hand
wider than the issue at hand

difficult_points: One 和 another 回指上一句提到的 four key characteristics。
or 在此连接近似解释，recognition... 对 intellectual humility 作具体说明。
wider than... 是形容词比较结构，后置修饰 perspectives。

sentences.sentence: Sensitivity to the possibility of change in social relations is also key, along with compromise or integration of different attitudes and beliefs.
sentences.translation: 对社会关系可能发生变化保持敏感也很关键，此外还包括妥协，或对不同态度和信念进行整合。

structure.text: Sensitivity to the possibility of change in social relations
along with compromise or integration of different attitudes and beliefs

difficult_points: 主语中心词是 Sensitivity，后面的多个介词短语逐层限定其内容。
along with 补充并列的其他关键特征，但不改变单数谓语 is。
compromise 与 integration 由 or 连接，构成两种相关能力。

expressions.text: integration of different attitudes and beliefs
expressions.meaning_zh: 对不同态度和信念的整合

sentences.sentence: Grossmann and his colleagues have also found that one of the most reliable ways to support wisdom in our own day-to-day decisions is to look at scenarios from a third-party perspective, as though giving advice to a friend.
sentences.translation: 格罗斯曼及其同事还发现，在日常决策中培养智慧，最可靠的方法之一就是从第三方视角审视各种情境，就像在给朋友提建议一样。

structure.text: that one of the most reliable ways to support wisdom in our own day-to-day decisions is to look at scenarios from a third-party perspective
one of the most reliable ways to support wisdom in our own day-to-day decisions
to support wisdom in our own day-to-day decisions
is to look at scenarios from a third-party perspective
as though giving advice to a friend

difficult_points: found 后接 that 宾语从句，从句主语是 one of the most reliable ways...。
ways 后的不定式说明这些方法的目的，系动词 is 后的不定式说明具体方法。
as though giving... 是省略主语和系动词的方式状语从句，可还原为 as though we were giving...。

expressions.text: one of the most reliable ways to

sentences.sentence: Research suggests that when adopting a first-person viewpoint we focus on 'the focal features of the environment' and when we adopt a third-person, 'observer' viewpoint we reason more broadly and focus more on interpersonal and moral ideals such as justice and impartiality.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，以第一人称视角看问题时，我们会关注“环境中的焦点特征”；而采用第三人称的“观察者”视角时，我们的思考会更加全面，也会更多关注正义、公正等人际和道德理想。

structure.text: that when adopting a first-person viewpoint we focus on 'the focal features of the environment' and when we adopt a third-person, 'observer' viewpoint we reason more broadly and focus more on interpersonal and moral ideals such as justice and impartiality
we focus on 'the focal features of the environment'
and when we adopt a third-person, 'observer' viewpoint
we reason more broadly and focus more on interpersonal and moral ideals

difficult_points: that 宾语从句内部由 and 连接两组“when 状语 + 主句”的对比结构。
when adopting... 省略了主语 we 和系动词 are，主语与后面主句一致。
第三人称条件下的 reason 与 focus 是由 and 连接的并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: Looking at problems from this more expansive viewpoint appears to foster cognitive processes related to wise decisions.
sentences.translation: 从这种更开阔的视角看待问题，似乎能促进与明智决策相关的认知过程。

structure.text: Looking at problems from this more expansive viewpoint
to foster cognitive processes related to wise decisions

difficult_points: Looking at... 是动名词短语，整体作主语。
appear to do 表示“似乎做某事”，语气比直接陈述更谨慎。
related to wise decisions 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 cognitive processes。

sentences.sentence: What are we to do, then, when confronted with situations like a disagreement with a spouse or negotiating a contract at work, that require us to take a personal stake?
sentences.translation: 那么，当我们面对与配偶发生分歧或在工作中谈判合同这类需要切身参与的情境时，该怎么办呢？

structure.text: What are we to do, then
when confronted with situations like a disagreement with a spouse or negotiating a contract at work
that require us to take a personal stake

difficult_points: be to do 在疑问句中表示应当采取的做法，即“我们该怎么办”。
when confronted with... 是省略 we are 的被动状语从句。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 situations，而非紧邻的 work。
a disagreement... 与 negotiating... 是 like 后列举的两类情境。

expressions.meaning_zh: 切身参与；牵涉个人利益

sentences.sentence: Grossmann argues that even when we aren't able to change the situation, we can still evaluate these experiences from different perspectives.
sentences.translation: 格罗斯曼认为，即使我们无法改变情境，仍然可以从不同视角审视这些经历。

structure.text: that even when we aren't able to change the situation, we can still evaluate these experiences from different perspectives
even when we aren't able to change the situation
we can still evaluate these experiences

difficult_points: argues 后接 that 引导的宾语从句，说明其主张。
even when 引导让步意味较强的时间状语从句，可译为“即使在……时”。
these experiences 回指前一句列举的个人利害相关情境。

sentences.sentence: For example, in one experiment that took place during the peak of a recent economic recession, graduating college seniors were asked to reflect on their job prospects.
sentences.translation: 例如，在最近一次经济衰退最严重时期开展的一项实验中，即将毕业的大四学生被要求思考自己的就业前景。

structure.text: that took place during the peak of a recent economic recession
to reflect on their job prospects

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 experiment，说明实验发生的时间背景。
graduating 是现在分词作定语，表示“即将毕业的”。
were asked to do 是 ask someone to do 的被动形式。

sentences.sentence: The students were instructed to imagine their career either 'as if you were a distant observer' or 'before your own eyes as if you were right there'.
sentences.translation: 学生们被要求想象自己的职业生涯：要么“仿佛你是一名远处的观察者”，要么“就在自己眼前，仿佛你身临其境”。

structure.text: either 'as if you were a distant observer'
or 'before your own eyes as if you were right there'
as if you were right there

difficult_points: were instructed to do 是被动结构，表示“被要求做某事”。
either... or... 连接两种互相对照的想象视角。
as if 后使用 were，体现与现实保持距离的假设语气。

sentences.sentence: Participants in the group assigned to the 'distant observer' role displayed more wisdom-related reasoning (intellectual humility and recognition of change) than did participants in the control group.
sentences.translation: 与对照组参与者相比，被分配为“远距离观察者”角色的小组成员表现出了更多与智慧相关的推理，例如智识谦逊和对变化的认识。

structure.text: Participants in the group assigned to the 'distant observer' role
than did participants in the control group

difficult_points: assigned to... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 group。
括号内容具体说明 wisdom-related reasoning 的两个表现。
than 后采用 did participants 倒装，以避免重复 displayed...。

sentences.sentence: In another study, couples in long-term romantic relationships were instructed to visualize an unresolved relationship conflict either through the eyes of an outsider or from their own perspective.
sentences.translation: 在另一项研究中，长期恋爱关系中的伴侣被要求想象一场尚未解决的关系冲突，想象时要么通过局外人的眼睛看待，要么从自己的视角看待。

structure.text: to visualize an unresolved relationship conflict
either through the eyes of an outsider

difficult_points: couples 是主语中心词，in... 说明这些伴侣所处的关系类型。
were instructed to visualize 是被动结构，表示研究人员给出的任务。
either... or... 连接两种观察同一冲突的方式。

sentences.sentence: Participants then discussed an incident with their partner for 10 minutes, after which they wrote down their thoughts about it.
sentences.translation: 随后，参与者与伴侣就一件事情讨论了十分钟，之后写下自己对此事的想法。

structure.text: then discussed an incident with their partner for 10 minutes
after which they wrote down their thoughts about it
wrote down their thoughts about it

difficult_points: after which 是“介词 + 关系代词”结构，which 指代前面的讨论过程。
with their partner 表示讨论对象，for 10 minutes 表示持续时间。
it 指代前面提到的 an incident。

sentences.sentence: Couples in the 'other's eyes' condition were significantly more likely to rely on wise reasoning – recognizing others' perspectives and searching for a compromise – compared to the couples in the egocentric condition.
sentences.translation: 与以自我为中心这一条件下的伴侣相比，处于“他人视角”条件下的伴侣明显更有可能运用明智推理，也就是理解他人的视角并寻求妥协。

structure.text: recognizing others' perspectives and searching for a compromise
compared to the couples in the egocentric condition

difficult_points: be more likely to 表示与另一组相比，某行为发生的可能性更高。
两个破折号之间的现在分词短语具体解释 wise reasoning 的表现。
compared to... 是过去分词结构，引出比较对象。

sentences.sentence: 'Ego-decentering promotes greater focus on others and enables a bigger picture, conceptual view of the experience, affording recognition of intellectual humility and change,' says Grossmann.
sentences.translation: 格罗斯曼说：“去自我中心化能让人更加关注他人，并从更宏观、更具概念性的角度看待经历，从而认识到智识谦逊与变化。”

structure.text: and enables a bigger picture, conceptual view of the experience
affording recognition of intellectual humility and change

difficult_points: promotes 与 enables 是由 and 连接、共用主语的并列谓语。
bigger picture 与 conceptual 共同修饰 view，前者强调宏观整体。
affording... 是结果性的现在分词短语，说明前述视角带来的认识。

sentences.sentence: We might associate wisdom with intelligence or particular personality traits, but research shows only a small positive relationship between wise thinking and crystallized intelligence and the personality traits of openness and agreeableness.
sentences.translation: 我们或许会把智慧与智力或某些人格特质联系起来，但研究显示，明智思维与晶体智力以及开放性、宜人性这两种人格特质之间只有很小的正相关。

structure.text: might associate wisdom with intelligence or particular personality traits
between wise thinking and crystallized intelligence and the personality traits of openness and agreeableness

difficult_points: associate A with B 表示“把 A 与 B 联系起来”。
but 后的研究结论与人们可能持有的直觉形成转折。
between 后的第二端包含 crystallized intelligence 以及两种 personality traits。

sentences.sentence: 'It is remarkable how much people can vary in their wisdom from one situation to the next, and how much stronger such contextual effects are for understanding the relationship between wise judgment and its social and affective outcomes as compared to the generalized “traits”,' Grossmann explains.
sentences.translation: 格罗斯曼解释说：“值得注意的是，同一个人在不同情境中的智慧程度可能有很大变化；而在理解明智判断与其社会和情感结果之间的关系时，这类情境效应比笼统的‘特质’强得多。”

structure.text: how much people can vary in their wisdom from one situation to the next
and how much stronger such contextual effects are for understanding the relationship between wise judgment and its social and affective outcomes as compared to the generalized “traits”
for understanding the relationship between wise judgment and its social and affective outcomes

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，后面两个由 and 连接的 how 从句是真正主语。
how much 既表示智慧变化的幅度，也修饰比较级 stronger 的程度。
between... and... 连接 wise judgment 与其 social and affective outcomes。
as compared to... 引出比较基准，即笼统的人格“特质”。

expressions.text: vary from one situation to the next

sentences.sentence: 'That is, knowing how wisely a person behaves in a given situation is more informative for understanding their emotions or likelihood to forgive [or] retaliate as compared to knowing whether the person may be wise “in general”.'
sentences.translation: “也就是说，要理解一个人的情绪，或其选择宽恕还是报复的可能性，了解此人在特定情境下表现得多么明智，比了解这个人是否‘总体上’有智慧更有参考价值。”

structure.text: knowing how wisely a person behaves in a given situation
how wisely a person behaves in a given situation
for understanding their emotions or likelihood to forgive [or] retaliate
as compared to knowing whether the person may be wise “in general”
whether the person may be wise “in general”

difficult_points: knowing... 是动名词短语作主语，其中 how 引导的从句作 knowing 的宾语。
their 使用单数中性指代，回指 a person。
likelihood 后的不定式说明可能发生的是 forgive 或 retaliate。
as compared to 后接另一个 knowing 短语，构成两类信息价值的比较。
